items.title: South Africa's exclusion from G7 summit no surprise, says Ramaphosa
items.dek: Reports say the US pressured France to rescind Ramaphosa’s invitation after Trump threatened to boycott the summit.
items.body: Reports say the US pressured France to rescind Ramaphosa’s invitation after Trump threatened to boycott the summit.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Whale swims off sandbank after big German rescue effort on Baltic coast
items.dek: Rescue teams now hope the whale will swim out of the shallow waters of Lübeck Bay and into the wider sea.
items.body: Rescue teams now hope the whale will swim out of the shallow waters of Lübeck Bay and into the wider sea.
items.author: IriLine Desk
